title: ADN-250 Dear, Please Forgive Me... Sensual Luck Akari Neo
description: Eri and Osamu are full of happiness after getting a second-hand but detached house. Eri cannot say that she is lonely, although the number of times she has sex tends to decrease compared to Osamu who only works overtime because of loan repayment. One day, Osamu sees an article about Feng Shui Master Shiina online. Osamu remembers that it was Shiina who had Feng Shui checked when he built his office, and he contacted Shiina to check his home as well.
